message:
chore(beads): deep design audit of 42 beads across 4 work streams

Second-pass design audit informed by codebase exploration:
- wa-2cha: extend existing watchdog.rs (not create new), delegate restart to wa-1igc
- wa-2c50: integrate with existing circuit_breaker.rs and retry.rs modules
- wa-1xcz: add injection mode flag to suppress false pattern detections during scrollback restore
- wa-32z7: add prominent WARNING about agent state loss on process re-launch
- wa-3bin: specify EWMA exponential decay algorithm for OutputRateTracker
- bd-9dp: document backpressure integration and cross-reference with wa-x4rq
- wa-x4rq: add reciprocal cross-reference to bd-9dp
- wa-n9cp: clarify segment-level dedup granularity and migration strategy

Also adds .br_history/ to .beads/.gitignore (local backup files).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,6 +32,9 @@ beads.left.meta.json
 beads.right.jsonl
 beads.right.meta.json
 
+# br history backups (local-only, machine-specific)
+.br_history/
+
 # Sync state (local-only, per-machine)
 # These files are machine-specific and should not be shared across clones
 .sync.lock
